meaning: n.(中世纪的)略具弯形的大刀,[诗]刀,剑
examples: Method Use minisize falchion concerting Chinese traditional medicine to degenerate lumbar osteoarthritis 61 cases.
Spring and Autumn Falchion is one skill of the Shaolin weapon forms. Falchion is the most powerful and difficult in the eighteen kinds of weapons, called the chief of weapons.
In this event, both of these brothers participated in the games, and took the third place in the broadsword match, fourth in the Southern Fist and sixth in falchion respectively.
